NVDA.name: NVIDIA Corporation
NVDA.ai_strategy_one_line_zh: 以CUDA与Blackwell为核心，打造软硬件协同的数据中心级AI基础设施平台。
NVDA.ai_strategy_one_line_en: Builds full-stack data-center AI infrastructure with CUDA and Blackwell to power model training, inference, and enterprise AI.

MSFT.name: Microsoft Corporation
MSFT.ai_strategy_one_line_zh: 以云+Copilot+代理为核心，构建安全可信的企业级AI平台并普及AI能力。
MSFT.ai_strategy_one_line_en: Builds a secure enterprise AI platform across cloud, Copilot, and agents.
concrete_bets: Security, compliance, identity, and privacy AI

PLTR.name: Palantir Technologies Inc.
PLTR.ai_strategy_one_line_zh: 以AIP把大模型接入Foundry/Gotham数据底座，在企业与政府场景中实现可控、可执行的AI决策。
PLTR.ai_strategy_one_line_en: Embed LLMs into Foundry and Gotham via AIP to deliver enterprise and government decision-making AI.
concrete_bets: Hybrid LLM access across open-source, self-hosted, and commercial models

META.name: Meta Platforms, Inc.
META.ai_strategy_one_line_zh: 以Meta AI驱动社交应用、内容推荐与AI眼镜等下一代体验，结合长期AI+硬件布局。
META.ai_strategy_one_line_en: Build Meta AI across apps, glasses, and the web to power discovery, creation, and next-gen social experiences.
concrete_bets: AI glasses and long-term AR hardware

themes.evidence_one_line_zh: 聚焦新模型发布、注意力/长上下文/并行推理与推理效率优化。
themes.evidence_one_line_en: Model releases, attention variants, long-context efficiency, and reasoning-scale inference.

themes.evidence_one_line_zh: 围绕编码代理、工具编排、经验记忆、评测和企业工作流自动化。
themes.evidence_one_line_en: Agent orchestration, coding assistants, memory, and enterprise workflow automation.

themes.evidence_one_line_zh: 涵盖OCR、嵌入、机器人、科研、教育、照片编辑与个人/国家级产品落地。
themes.evidence_one_line_en: Practical deployments across OCR, embeddings, robotics, science, education, and consumer products.

themes.evidence_one_line_zh: 关注开源政策与内容溯源，强调透明度、验证与责任机制。
themes.evidence_one_line_en: Open-source policy and content provenance for transparency and accountability.

alias.notes: All raw themes were mapped to existing canonical names by grouping obvious equivalents and spelling variants; no new canonical names were needed.
